title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Bombay - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Bombay - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!
